SecureShare
Phase 3
Reports

This landing page provides clear visibility of the current SecureShare reports in one place so users can move quickly between operational, finance, VRDD, and EFT views.

Welcome to SecureShare Phase 3 Power BI Reports

This page has been designed to provide clear visibility of all SecureShare phase reports in one place. These are standard Power BI reports, and this page allows users to quickly access Operational Reporting, Finance Performance, VRDD Appropriations, EFT Confirmation, Leavers Report, and Monthly Engagement, with additional reports to be added as they are developed and released.

Operational
Reporting Finance
Performance VRDD
Appropriations EFT
Confirmation Leavers Report Monthly Engagement
Dashboard SecureShare Deployments
Stats
This landing page will continue to evolve as the SecureShare reporting suite expands. For any questions, please contact CustomerSolutionsDataStrategy@irishlife.ie or tony.tawakali@irishlife.ie
